I only figured out later that people played Purple because of Daph, and here I am just saving up because I couldn't care about her even tho I do like her design.

In other games,they dont have balls to nerf the character you just got

But on mobile, they discovered that the manager pack wasnt working as intended after like 2 months +. Do you know what their solution was?
